title: QIF executable judgment gate v0: qif-judgment-record command
description: Add the first executable QIF judgment surface: schemas/aof-qif-judgment.schema.json and src/commands/qif-judgment-record.js. The command records intent/risk/loss-boundary/evidence/verdict/confidence/governance-trigger, computes sha256 content digests for subject and evidence, and rejects self-judged pass verdicts (maker-checker rule). Stop condition: command wired into catalog+registry+CLI, negative tests reject self-judged pass and missing evidence, npm test green, organization-verify green. Verification gate: test/qif-judgment.test.js plus organization-verify plus command-registry-refresh alignment. Out of scope: QIF projection into HRI, organization-verify digest re-check, benchmark integration.
triage_notes: Selected as the v5.1 track frontier slice by the 2026-07-02 runtime-backed direction review (docs/post-v5.0-direction-review-2026-07-02.md). Human council ratification of the v5.1 theme is still pending; implementation may proceed but the release claim may not.
